results.rendered_html:
vyatyas
I. 2 A. (vyatihe, vyatise, vyatiste) To excel, surpass, be above or superior to, outweigh; anyo vyatiste tu mamāpi dharmaḥ  Bk. 2. 35. 
II. 4 P. To invert, reverse, change upside down; see vyatyasta below.
